# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "1.1"

services:
  - name: "service-a"
    host: "service-a.example.com"
    routes:
      - name: "route-a"
        paths: ["/path-a"]
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        upstreams:
          - name: "upstream-a"
            targets:
              - target: "http://localhost:8001"
              - target: "http://localhost:8002"
            load_balancing: "roundrobin"

  - name: "service-b"
    host: "service-b.example.com"
    routes:
      - name: "route-b"
        paths: ["/path-b"]
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        upstreams:
          - name: "upstream-b"
            targets:
              - target: "http://localhost:8003"
              - target: "http://localhost:8004"
            load_balancing: "roundrobin"
